message:
fix(btree,core): use wrapping_mul for benchmark RNG seed + replace clone with Copy

- Benchmark RNG seed initialization used plain * which could overflow
  in debug builds. Changed to wrapping_mul (intentional hash mixing).
- Replaced .clone() with * dereference for Copy type (BtrfsKey).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
